title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce solution for online sales management built at IIT. Features a secure RESTful API with JWT authentication, flexible data management with MongoDB, and a modern responsive UI with Angular and Bootstrap.

title: HospitEx
description: Medical clinic appointment management system built at IIT. Developed with the .NET framework for a robust and flexible backend, SQL Server for secure data management, and a modern intuitive interface using GUNA.UI libraries.

title: Enterprise & Event Manager
description: Web application for enterprise and online event management. Built with SpringBoot and Angular, featuring JWT authentication, Google Maps integration for geolocation, Stripe payment processing, automated email notifications, and a full admin dashboard.

title: Airport HR Manager
description: Internal application designed to optimize employee and department management within the Sfax airport. Built with Angular frontend, SpringBoot backend, UML modeling, and MySQL database.
